events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need infer scenario: Progress photos for Loop checks & wiring show current checkpoint scope finished for area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. We need assess progress, defects, remains. No specific defects described; current checkpoint scope finished, remaining visible work is cleanup/labeling/follow-on finish outside checkpoint. Decision likely pass (checkpoint complete) but percent complete maybe 95%? Since rough-complete stage, work not closed out. Component conditions none. Risk low. Need include references loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Findings maybe none / pending housekeeping. Actions: complete cleanup, labeling, close out documentation. Since no defects, decision pass. But work_stage should reflect observed stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 90. value 0. confidence high ~0.9. Need output valid JSON with specified fields.
